calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l .github/prompts/predict.md schemas/prediction.schema.json schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500239 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500239 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73500239 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files -uu -g '!.git/**' | rg '73500239|record/(context|documents)|snapshot' | sort | head -300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/record/snapshots/2026-07-18.json && sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/record/documents/documents.json && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && sed -n '1,520p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500239/recor

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|Sixth|paid|Paid|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,180p' metrics/statpack.md && sed -n '180,360p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n 'salience|fee_class|Paid|paid' metrics/statpack.json | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '3580,3708p' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);
const xs = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search|citation/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(xs);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Garcetti academic freedom public university professor",court:["ca1","ca2","ca3","ca4","ca5","ca6","ca7","ca8","ca9","ca10","ca11","cadc"],filed_after:"2006-05-30",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","status","snippet","absolute_url"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"academic freedom\" AND Garcetti",filed_after:"2006-05-30",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","status","absolute_url"],num_results:20}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73500239/record | sort && find data/cases/scotus/73500239 -maxdepth 4 -type f -name '*manifest*' -o -name '*tool*' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73500239/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z && echo output_path_clear","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);
